design_philosophy: A highly professional, premium, and trustworthy SaaS landing page tailored for the SME market in the GCC (specifically Oman). Avoids typical vibrant, techy gradients (like Zendesk/Freshworks) to establish a more grounded, high-end 'consultative' presence. Uses deep emerald green, warm alabaster backgrounds, and stark charcoal typography. Emphasizes Arabic RTL support intrinsically, rather than as an afterthought.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight

navbar.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200/50
navbar.behavior: Sticky, transparent until scroll, includes Language Toggle (AR/EN) and Primary CTA.

hero.layout: Center-aligned with massive, expressive Arabic typography. Subtitle underneath, followed by a primary and secondary CTA.
hero.visuals: Underneath the text, display a large, floating dashboard mockup or abstract visualization of 'connected messages'. Use subtle, slow-moving floating elements to create depth.

features_bento.layout: Bento grid with 5 cards. 2 large cards spanning multiple columns (Omnichannel Inbox, AI Chatbot), 3 smaller cards (WhatsApp Embedded, Team Collaboration, CRM).
features_bento.style: Flat background (#FFFFFF) with 1px border (#E7E5E4), subtle shadow on hover. Icons should be clear and premium.

how_it_works.layout: 3-column grid or horizontal timeline. Cards representing 'Sign up', 'Connect Channels', 'Start Responding'.
how_it_works.style: Use large numbers (1, 2, 3) in accent color with a decorative connecting line behind them.

pricing.layout: 3 cards (Growth: 35 OMR, Pro: 75 OMR, Enterprise: 150+ OMR). The 'Pro' card should be highlighted.
pricing.style: Highlighted card uses the dark_section color (#064E3B) with inverse text. Other cards use white background with standard borders.

testimonials.layout: Masonry grid or a large swiping carousel of customer quotes.
testimonials.style: Cards with profile pictures, names, and roles.

footer.style: Dark section (#064E3B) or very light alternative (#F3F0E6). Generous padding (py-24), large brand logo, footer links, and newsletter/final CTA.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with increased shadow. Card borders darken.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for hero elements and sections.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use a slow-moving editorial ribbon for logos/integrations if needed.

accessibility_and_testing.rtl_support: CRITICAL: The entire application must be built with `dir='rtl'` in mind as the default. Use logical properties (`ms-`, `me-`, `ps-`, `pe-` instead of `ml-`, `mr-`, etc.).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against the emerald background meets APCA 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All buttons, inputs, and links must have `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid='hero-cta-button'`).

hero_dashboard_mockup.description: Used as a placeholder for the platform/dashboard mockup in the hero section.

team_collaboration.description: Used in the 'Team Collaboration' feature card.

modern_office_bg.description: Can be used as a subtle background element or for the testimonial section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
The primary language is Arabic. Set the HTML `dir='rtl'`. Use Tailwind's logical properties (e.g., `pe-4` instead of `pr-4`) to ensure the layout flips correctly if the user toggles to English.
Include Google Fonts 'Alexandria' and 'Cairo' in the main index.css or index.html.
Do NOT use typical SaaS purple/blue gradients. Stick to the refined color palette: Alabaster, Deep Emerald, and Charcoal.
Implement the 'Features' section using the Bento Grid layout strategy as described.
Ensure all Shadcn components (Accordion, Buttons, etc.) are customized to match the border radii (rounded-2xl) and colors specified.
